description_long: This humanoid robot features a large, spherical head with a prominent, light blue visor or faceplate that covers most of the front. Its body is compact and cylindrical, with articulated arms and legs that are segmented and end in three-fingered hands and rounded feet, all colored in a combination of white and blue. The chest displays a printed label with the words 'LUSOJA' and 'PROFISSÕES' in blue and orange, suggesting a possible educational or promotional function. The robot's joints are clearly defined, allowing for a wide range of motion in the limbs, and the hands are shown in a waving gesture. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a semi-glossy finish, and the overall design is friendly and approachable, suitable for interaction in public urban environments. No visible external sensors or facial features are present beyond the visor.
description: A friendly humanoid robot with a large spherical head, blue visor, articulated limbs, and a labeled chest, designed for approachable urban interaction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large blue visor, chest label, and a waving hand gesture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spherical head, visor profile, and limb articulation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and both arms, with one hand raised.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the head's roundness, visor edge, and arm positioning.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both legs straight, left arm raised in a waving gesture, right arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; the robot has integrated panels with a printed label on the chest, featuring blue and orange text as a decorative element.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a large, smooth, light blue visor covering most of the head's front; no eyes, mouth, or nose are visible, and there are no expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, suggesting hinge or rotary articulation; hands have three articulated fingers, and feet are rounded and jointed.
